name: Bengaluru
description: Bengaluru is a vibrant, modern metropolis in Karnataka, famous as India's technology hub, garden city, and culinary capital.
about_more: Enjoy its pleasant climate, grand gardens like Cubbon Park, and Tudor-style Bangalore Palace. Bengaluru is also the beer capital of India, with a rich cafe and street food culture.

attractions.name: Bangalore Palace
attractions.desc: A royal palace inspired by Windsor Castle, boasting Tudor-style architecture and vintage paintings.
attractions.description: A royal palace inspired by Windsor Castle, boasting Tudor-style architecture and vintage paintings.

attractions.name: Lalbagh Botanical Garden
attractions.desc: An ancient garden houses India's largest collection of tropical plants and an iconic London-style Glass House.
attractions.description: An ancient garden houses India's largest collection of tropical plants and an iconic London-style Glass House.

attractions.name: Cubbon Park
attractions.desc: A massive 300-acre lush green park in the heart of Bengaluru, serving as a sanctuary of biodiverse nature.
attractions.description: A massive 300-acre lush green park in the heart of Bengaluru, serving as a sanctuary of biodiverse nature.

luxury.name: Taj Resort & Spa Bengaluru
luxury.desc: World-class 5-star premium stay in Bengaluru offering heritage interiors, spa, and fine dining.

luxury.name: The Leela Palace Bengaluru
luxury.desc: Elegant suites, private pools, royal gardens, and personalized service in Bengaluru.

comfort.name: Lemon Tree Premier Bengaluru
comfort.desc: Comfortable rooms with modern amenities, swimming pool, and business lounge in Bengaluru.

comfort.name: Fortune Park Bengaluru
comfort.desc: Bright, contemporary rooms with outstanding hospitality and rooftop dining in Bengaluru.

budget.name: Zostel Bengaluru

budget.desc: Clean and affordable rooms with friendly service and direct transit links in Bengaluru.

travel_tips: Dress conservatively when visiting sacred places. Remove footwear where requested. Respect local customs.
nearby_attractions: Scenic viewpoints, local handicraft hubs, and historical sites of Karnataka within 15km.
